title: Ondo tokenizes BlackRock's IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model
message_html: Ondo tokenizes BlackRock's IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model ...
snippet: Ondo Finance launches tokenized BlackRock IVV ETF and Micron shares under SEC-defined custodial model with Ethereum-based settlement.

title: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US
message_html: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US ...
snippet: Ondo Finance today announced the first live solution of third-party tokenized U.S. securities operating entirely within the existing regulatory perimeter in the U.S., in partnership with Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc., (NYSE: BR) to provide full voting rights for tokenized equity holders.

title: Payward completes Reap acquisition
snippet: Payward, a unified financial infrastructure platform advancing an open, global financial system, today announced the completion of its acquisition of Reap Technologies Holdings Limited (“Reap”), a leading stablecoin-native, card issuing and payments infrastructure company enabling global money movem

title: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions
message_html: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions ...
snippet: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.
